subcodes.first_line: The Hidden Name hath appeared from the horizon of manifestation and is dawning forth, yet the heedless servants remain debarred and deprived therefrom. Blessed are they [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسم مکنون از افق ظهور ظاهر و مشرق ولکن عباد غافل از او ممنوع و محروم طوبی از
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @high station of the true believer
